footer.copyright: © {year} SkillStream AI — Built on AWS Bedrock & Polly

landing.poweredByBadge: Powered by AWS Bedrock & Amazon Polly
landing.heroDescription: SkillStream AI turns any tech topic into a structured audio roadmap. Clear, ordered episodes that fit into your day.
landing.howItWorksSectionTitle: From topic to podcast in minutes
landing.featuresSectionTitle: Everything you need to level up
landing.step1Description: Explore AI-generated learning paths across any technology domain.
landing.step2Description: Amazon Bedrock generates a hierarchical syllabus ordered from foundations to expert level.
landing.step3Description: Amazon Polly narrates each module as a crisp 5–10 minute podcast episode.
landing.aiRoadmapsFeatureDescription: Enter any tech topic and receive a structured, level-progressive learning path in seconds.
landing.podcastFeatureDescription: Each roadmap node is paired with a curated audio episode you can listen to on the go.
landing.agenticFeatureDescription: Trend Discovery and Content Lifecycle agents keep your library fresh without manual effort.
landing.progressFeatureDescription: Mark episodes complete, save roadmaps, and watch your expertise grow over time.
landing.awsFeatureDescription: Powered by Amazon Bedrock, Polly, Step Functions, and DynamoDB for scale and reliability.
landing.mobileFeatureDescription: Convert your commute, gym session, or any dead time into productive learning windows.

roadmaps.title: Learning Roadmaps
roadmaps.subtitle: AI-generated roadmaps with structured episodes — tap a roadmap to explore its episodes.
roadmaps.noRoadmapsHint: Check back soon — roadmaps are generated automatically.
roadmaps.singlePageDescription: Work through each module in order — foundations before advanced concepts.
roadmaps.singlePageBrowseHint: Browse all roadmaps and their episodes from the

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.subtitle: Autonomous agents that run in the background — spotting trends, scanning your content, and making sure every roadmap stays relevant.
agents.trendingSubtitle: Latest audio episodes generated from trending topics
agents.roadmapSubtitle: Showing the last time each roadmap received new content
agents.trendTagline: Finds what the tech world is learning right now
agents.trendDesc: Scans Google Trends and developer communities using Amazon Bedrock Strands and Tavily Search, then surfaces the top learning topics worth adding to your roadmap.
agents.contentTagline: Scans your roadmaps and checks that content stays current
agents.contentDesc: Reads every published roadmap, inspects the last time each one was updated, and flags entries that may be outdated — so your library never goes stale.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your roadmaps and episodes.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Get started with your learning journey today.

topicInput.label: What do you want to learn?
topicInput.placeholder: e.g. Machine Learning, AWS Lambda, React Performance…
